description.en: Back-propagation developed through several strands of adaptive control and neural-network research, with Shunichi Amari's adaptive pattern classifiers and the 1986 Rumelhart-Hinton-Williams paper becoming central references. The method efficiently computes gradients through layered networks.
description.zh: 反向传播来自自适应控制和神经网络研究的多条线索，其中甘利俊一的自适应模式分类器以及 1986 年鲁梅尔哈特-辛顿-威廉姆斯论文成为核心参考。该方法能高效计算分层网络中的梯度。

html.en: Back-propagation developed through several strands of adaptive control and neural-network research, with Shunichi Amari's adaptive pattern classifiers and the 1986 Rumelhart-Hinton-Williams paper becoming central references. The method efficiently computes gradients through layered networks.
html.zh: 反向传播来自自适应控制和神经网络研究的多条线索，其中甘利俊一的自适应模式分类器以及 1986 年鲁梅尔哈特-辛顿-威廉姆斯论文成为核心参考。该方法能高效计算分层网络中的梯度。

html.en: Output error is differentiated backward through the network so each weight receives an update. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.
html.zh: 输出误差沿网络反向求导，使每个权重获得更新量。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。

html.en: Experts generally treat back-propagation as the optimization workhorse of neural networks, while acknowledging its multi-decade rediscovery history. Its long-term legacy is making deep layered representations trainable at scale.
html.zh: 专家通常把反向传播视为神经网络优化的核心工具，同时也承认它经历了多阶段重新发现。它的长期影响在于让深层表示能够大规模训练。

material.en: Nature paper and earlier adaptive classifier literature
material.zh: Nature 论文与更早的自适应分类器文献

demo.en: Output error is differentiated backward through the network so each weight receives an update.
demo.zh: 输出误差沿网络反向求导，使每个权重获得更新量。

text.en: Layer gradients are linked by derivatives.
Hidden weights receive blame for output error.
text.zh: 隐藏层权重为输出误差分配责任。

title.zh: 通过反向传播误差学习表示

description.en: Primary Nature paper record for modern back-propagation.
